name: Mobil İmza e-Signature
description: Turkish Mobile Signature aggregator (E-Güven/TÜRKKEP-style) eID / e-signature provider, contributed into esign:provider — sandboxed. Routes signing to the user's GSM operator via an aggregator REST API. The aggregator API key stays host-side; certificate verification is host-side.

settings.label: Aggregator Base URL
settings.help: Mobile-signature aggregator REST API base URL.

settings.label: Customer Code
settings.help: Aggregator customer code (sent as X-Customer-Code), if your aggregator requires it.

secrets.label: Aggregator API Key
secrets.help: Bearer token for the aggregator API; injected host-side, never seen by the plugin.
